sglang.title: [Fix] Reduce busy polling when scheduler is idle
sglang.author: p12tic
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In setups which have long inactivity periods it is desirable to reduce system power consumption when sglang does nothing. This would lead not only to power savings, but also to more CPU thermal headroom when a request eventually comes. This is important in cases when multiple GPUs are con

Before: 15us + 18us -> After: 0

Remove unnecessary metadata_expand.max_seq_len_k operations in fa3 - there is no code reference to metadata_expand.max_seq_len_k variable anymore
Profile scripts:
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --speculative-num-steps 3 --speculative-eagle-topk 2 --specul

vllm.title: [BugFix] Handle missing sep_token for Qwen3-Reranker in Score API
vllm.author: strutive07
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR addresses an issue where the Score API incorrectly handles the Qwen/Qwen3-Reranker-* model, which does not have a sep_token.
Thanks to @noooop  create PR #19260, so we can run Qwen3-Reranker on vLLM, but i found some small bug when using Score API with Qwen3-Reranker.
When making a r

vllm.title: [AMD][Kernel][BugFix] fix test_rocm_compressed_tensors_w8a8 for rocm
vllm.author: rasmith
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This fixes an issue where test_rocm_compressed_tensors_w8a8 is unable to run on AMD hardware because torch.compile encounters issues in _custom_ops.py and triton_scaled_mm.py due to the use of torch.Size and importlib, which torch.compile does not support using these features.

vllm.title: [Security] Prevent new imports of (cloud)pickle
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This change proposes an additional pre-commit check that bans new
imports of pickle or cloudpickle unless they are added to an
allowlist in tools/check_pickle_imports.py. The reasoning is that
these modules are known to be unsafe when deserializing data from
potentially untrusted parties. It has res

vllm.title: [Bugfix][V1] Allow manual FlashAttention for Blackwell
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
In the previous PR to use FlashInfer by default (#19118), this inadventantly prevents FlashAttention from being used if FlashInfer is installed since we don't have an explicit case to check for the selected_backend to be FA.

Test locally on a B200
Test Result

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Respect num-gpu-blocks-override in v1
vllm.author: jmswen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR ensures that --num-gpu-blocks-override is respected in v1. This option is useful for testing preemption and CPU KV cache offloading via a custom KV connector.
Test Plan
Added test case to tests/v1/core/test_kv_cache_utils.py::test_get_kv_cache_config:
pytest -s -vv tests/v1/core/test

vllm.title: Fix TorchAOConfig skip layers
vllm.author: mobicham
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
[Follow-up to #19147 due to DCO rebasing issues]
Purpose
The goal of this small PR is to fix loading torchao models where not all the layers have been quantized.
The current implementation doesn't keep track of the skipped layers defined in config["modules_to_not_convert"]. As a result, quantized VL

vllm.title: [torch.compile][ROCm] Fuse quantization onto attention using a torch.compile pass
vllm.author: ProExpertProg
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR implements the fusion of fp8 quantization onto attention, described in #16220. It performs this fusion using a new AttnFusionPass, which uses the pattern matcher and only performs the fusion if the backend supports it. It is currently off by default, pending more robust V1 support and perfor

vllm.title: [Spec Decode][Benchmark] Generalize spec decode offline benchmark to more methods and datasets
vllm.author: ekagra-ranjan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Merge after #18511 so that CustomDataset can be used.
Currently, offline benchmark only supports eagle via offline_inference/eagle.py and supports mtbench dataset which users have to download and place in the right directory.
This PR improves the benchmark setup:

Adds offline_inference/spec_decode.

vllm.title: [Misc] Turn MOE_DP_CHUNK_SIZE into an env var
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
There is value in being able to try different MOE_DP_CHUNK_SIZE quickly, without code change,

Performance Tuning
For large MOE_DP_CHUNK_SIZE and large DP size, we run into OOMs

Long-Term : Based on profile runs, set it to a constant-value / calculate at run-time based on profile runs.
Test

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Enforce contiguous input for dynamic_per_token FP8/INT8 quant
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
We require that the inputs are contiguous for both the dynamic_per_token_scaled_fp8_quant and dynamic_scaled_int8_quant kernels. This PR enforces that as I ran into an error when evaluating a deepseek model.
Test Plan
Tested using FP8-dynamic DeepSeek V2 Lite (per token and per channel)
Test

Purpose
Bug:
VLLM_ALL2ALL_BACKEND="deepep_low_latency" VLLM_USE_DEEP_GEMM=1  vllm serve Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B-FP8  --trust-remote-code  --data-parallel-size 2 --enable-expert-parallel --port 9010  --no-enable-prefix-caching

vllm.title: [Fix] The zip function in Python 3.9 does not have the strict argument
vllm.author: princepride
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix #19432
Test Plan
Run the command:
uv venv -p 3.9 --seed
source .venv/bin/activate
uv pip install -U vllm \
    --torch-backend=auto \
    --extra-index-url https://wheels.vllm.ai/nightly
# vllm==0.9.1rc2
vllm serve facebook/opt-125m --port 30303

curl http://localhost:30303/v1/completion
